{{Quote|Welcome! I am Tyrann, your humble host…and absolute arbitrator of life and death!|Tyrann to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Tanith Shire]]|<ref name="The Serpent Masters">"[[The Serpent Masters]]"</ref>}}
'''Tyrann''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] living on [[Ophideraan]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was the [[Grand Master/Legends|Supreme Master]] of the [[Serpent Masters]], ruling from the [[Great Well]]. He was an imposing man with a short beard and commonly wore a white cloak and headwrap. He wore a medallion around his neck that hid a special transmitter used to control the [[flying serpent]]s.

==Biography==
Tyrann commanded not only the Serpent Masters but a workforce of slaves, whom he put to work in the [[Slave level|lower level]] of the Great Well, extracting water from the planet's mantle. When [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] and [[Tanith Shire]] crash-landed on Ophideraan, Tyrann's warriors brought them before the Supreme Master, who ordered Luke's execution. However, Tanith, currently in Tyrann's employ, was able to convince Tyrann otherwise, and both were sent down to the lower level. There, Luke discovered the [[Cavern of the Serpents|serpents' homeground]], but Tyrann and his aide, [[Varn (individual)|Varn]], followed and confronted him. Tyrann forced Luke to attempt to ride one of the serpents, as he had done with previous infiltrators. Varn hoped Luke, unable to control the serpent, would fall onto the rocks of the cavern, as others had, but Tyrann still wanted to keep Luke alive to serve as his slave.

This proved to be a mistake on Tyrann's part, since Luke was able to learn how Tyrann controlled his serpents, and had [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]] duplicate the code, allowing Luke to gain control. Realizing this, Tyrann held Tanith hostage, and ordered Varn to kill Luke. However, Skywalker proved to be a match for Tyrann's aide, and during the fight realized Tyrann's medallion was the source of the transmissions. Luke swooped down to Tyrann on his serpent, and used his [[Lightsaber/Legends|lightsaber]] to cut the medallion from around the Supreme Master's neck. Lunging desperately to catch his medallion, Tyrann toppled over the edge of the platform and plunged to his death in the Great Well. The medallion was also destroyed, and the Serpent Masters lost all control of their beasts.
